title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Finout, a cloud cost-management SaaS company with 100+ employees across Tel Aviv and New York, seeks a Head of Revenue Operations reporting to the CRO. Requires 7+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Ops, or Strategy in high-growth B2B SaaS, proven experience scaling RevOps beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce administration and revenue analytics expertise, and strong cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR. A hands-on leader-doer comfortable building flows, dashboards, and data models while collaborating with the Tel Aviv HQ.
score_reason: Omri's 15+ years in B2B SaaS RevOps, proven expertise scaling beyond $30M+ ARR, and deep Salesforce/analytics chops align perfectly with Finout's requirements. Tel Aviv HQ location is ideal, and Head of RevOps is his exact target role.
ai_opener: Omri here—I've scaled RevOps functions through multiple hypergrowth phases in B2B SaaS, building Salesforce workflows and revenue forecasting models that drove predictability at $100M+ ARR. Finout's cloud cost-management positioning resonates with fintech/infrastructure GTM work I've led, and I'm excited about the opportunity to own RevOps strategy from your Tel Aviv hub.

title: RevOps Manager, Territory Strategy & Operations
description: Gong seeks a RevOps Manager focused on territory strategy and operations. The role partners with Sales leadership, Strategy, and Finance to optimize territory composition, redesign territory models for global scalability, and analyze historical performance and market potential to inform segmentation and coverage. Requires deep understanding of B2B SaaS go-to-market models, strong analytical skills with Excel, SQL, and BI tools (Tableau, Retool), proficiency in Salesforce, and experience with territory management tools like Fullcast, Pigment, or Anaplan.
score_reason: Omri's 15+ years in B2B SaaS RevOps, proven Salesforce expertise, and strong analytical background in pipeline forecasting and GTM optimization align perfectly with this territory strategy and operations role. Gong's remote structure and sophisticated sales operations needs match his senior-level expectations and skillset.

Your RevOps Manager opening caught my attention because territory strategy optimization is exactly where I've driven the most impact: redesigning coverage models, building forecasting engines, and aligning sales operations with finance to unlock revenue predictability. I'd love to explore how my Salesforce expertise and experience with territory management workflows could accelerate Gong's global scaling.

title: GTM Engineer
description: Supabase seeks a GTM Engineer to design and build automation across its GTM stack (HubSpot, BigQuery, Hightouch, enrichment tools), own PLS trigger infrastructure, and integrate AI (Claude, Gemini) into rep workflows for account research and meeting prep. Requires 3+ years in GTM Engineering, Sales Engineering, or RevOps Engineering at a B2B SaaS company, comfort with HubSpot APIs, SQL/BigQuery, and building automations in Python or Node.js. Fully remote with ESOP, tech allowance, and health benefits.

ai_opener: Omri here—I noticed Supabase is building AI-native GTM automation across HubSpot and BigQuery. With 15+ years scaling RevOps and GTM stacks in B2B SaaS, I've spent the last few years designing exactly these kinds of automations (API-driven PLS triggers, rep workflow intelligence) and integrating LLM-powered account research tools. I'd love to explore how I can help you operationalize Claude/Gemini into your sales workflows at scale.

Requires 3-5 years in GTM Ops, RevOps, or Growth Engineering at a B2B SaaS company, comfort with HubSpot, Apollo, Clay, SQL, APIs, and webhooks, plus experience cleaning CRMs, deduplicating records, and building enrichment pipelines. score_reason: Excellent match on GTM Engineer role, B2B SaaS, HubSpot expertise, and AI-native GTM interests. However, Omri's 15+ years seniority significantly exceeds the 3-5 year requirement, which may position him overqualified or create compensation misalignment.

With 15+ years building revenue systems at scale (HubSpot, Salesforce, pipeline forecasting), I've recently shifted focus toward hands-on GTM engineering—exactly the creative + analytical mix you're looking for. title: GTM RevOps Engineer
description: Liatrio, an enterprise technology modernization firm, seeks a GTM RevOps Engineer to design automated workflows across prospecting, lead enrichment, scoring, and routing, and build integrations across the GTM stack (HubSpot, sales engagement platforms, Clay, ZoomInfo). Requires proficiency in Python, SQL, and/or JavaScript, API and webhook experience, and familiarity with no-code/low-code platforms like Make and n8n.
